# Manus AI 101: The Complete Guide to the Autonomous AI Agent + 100 Use Cases & Prompts

[![Sid Saladi's avatar](https://substackcdn.com/image/fetch/$s_!5sth!,w_36,h_36,c_fill,f_auto,q_auto:good,fl_progressive:steep/https%3A%2F%2Fbucketeer-e05bbc84-baa3-437e-9518-adb32be77984.s3.amazonaws.com%2Fpublic%2Fimages%2F828157c4-9422-4ed5-8f4d-068cda15ab86_450x450.jpeg)](https://substack.com/@sidsaladi)

[Sid Saladi](https://substack.com/@sidsaladi)

Mar 11, 2026

∙ Paid

4

1

Share

[![](https://substackcdn.com/image/fetch/$s_!06gr!,w_1456,c_limit,f_auto,q_auto:good,fl_progressive:steep/https%3A%2F%2Fsubstack-post-media.s3.amazonaws.com%2Fpublic%2Fimages%2Ffd264d8f-1ac4-42bb-858a-458bf86c1b91_1536x1024.png)](https://substackcdn.com/image/fetch/$s_!06gr!,f_auto,q_auto:good,fl_progressive:steep/https%3A%2F%2Fsubstack-post-media.s3.amazonaws.com%2Fpublic%2Fimages%2Ffd264d8f-1ac4-42bb-858a-458bf86c1b91_1536x1024.png)

You know that feeling when you give an AI a task, and then spend the next 30 minutes babysitting it through every. single. step?

“Search this.” “Now analyze that.” “Okay, put it in a table.” “Wait, you forgot the thing I said five prompts ago.”

What if you could just... tell AI what you want, walk away, and come back to a finished deliverable?

That’s not a fantasy. That’s **Manus AI**.

* * *

The Product Channel By Sid Saladi is a reader-supported publication. To receive new posts and support my work, consider becoming a free or paid subscriber.

Subscribe

* * *

## ⚡ The Problem With Every AI Tool You’ve Tried

Here’s a truth that nobody talks about.

Most AI tools today are _reactive_. You prompt. They respond. You prompt again. They respond again.

It’s like having an employee who can only follow one instruction at a time and forgets everything between tasks.

You end up being the project manager, the quality checker, and the workflow designer — for a tool that was supposed to save you time.

**Manus changes the game.**

Instead of responding to individual prompts, Manus _plans_, _executes_, and _delivers_ complete workflows autonomously. You describe the end goal. It figures out the steps. It browses the web, writes code, creates files, analyzes data, builds websites — all without you hovering over it.

This is the shift from **chatbot AI** to **agentic AI**. And it’s a big deal.

* * *

## 🤖 What Exactly Is Manus AI?

**Manus** (from the Latin phrase “Mens et Manus” meaning “mind and hand”) is the world’s first general-purpose autonomous AI agent.

Here’s what you need to know:

- **Built by:** Butterfly Effect (formerly Monica.im), now acquired by **Meta for $2B+** in December 2025

- **Launched:** March 6, 2025

- **Headquarters:** Singapore (originally China-based)

- **Revenue:** $100M+ ARR within 8 months of launch

- **Users:** 2M+ on the waitlist within a week; 13.9M monthly visits

- **Discord:** Grew to 138,000+ members in days

- **Benchmark:** Scored 86.5% on GAIA — outperforming OpenAI’s Deep Research by 10%+


The best way to think about Manus: **it’s not a chatbot. It’s a digital employee.**

You give it a goal. It creates a plan. It opens a virtual computer, browses the web, runs code, creates documents, and delivers the finished product. You can watch it work in real-time through the “Manus’s Computer” window, or walk away and come back when it’s done.

Jack Dorsey publicly endorsed it. IBM called it “a nice mix of deep search, deep research, and browsing.” Hugging Face’s head of product called it “the most impressive AI tool I’ve ever tried.”

Now — [with Meta’s backing](https://sidsaladi.substack.com/p/ai-unwrapped-1-elon-wants-to-run) — Manus is integrating into Facebook, Instagram, WhatsApp, and Meta AI. The future of agentic AI just got a $2 billion stamp of approval.

* * *

## 🚀 Getting Started: From Zero to First Task in 5 Minutes

**Step 1: Sign up at [manus.im](https://manus.im/)**

Create an account using email or social login. Confirm your email and you’re in.

**Step 2: Choose your mode**

Manus has two modes:

- **Chat Mode** — Quick Q&A conversations (like ChatGPT)

- **Agent Mode** — Full autonomous task execution (the real power)


**Step 3: Pick your plan**

Plan Price Monthly Credits Concurrent Tasks Best For **Free** $0 300/day refresh 1 Exploring & light tasks **Plus** $39/mo 4,000 20 Regular users & freelancers **Pro** $199/mo 19,900 20 Power users & agencies **Team** $39/member/mo Shared pool 20 Organizations

> 💡 **Pro tip:** Free users get 1,000 starter credits that never expire + 300 daily refresh credits. Start here. Use the 300 daily credits for iterative work across multiple days.

**Step 4: Give it a task**

Type your goal in the prompt box. Be specific. Include the deliverable format you want (report, spreadsheet, website, presentation, etc.).

Hit enter. Watch the magic through the “Manus’s Computer” window.

**Step 5: Download your deliverables**

Manus outputs are downloadable as Word docs, Excel files, PDFs, PowerPoint slides, websites, and more. Fully editable.

**That’s it. You’re live.**

**Common setup tips:**

- Free users get access to **Manus 1.6 Lite** in Agent Mode

- Pro users unlock **Manus 1.6**, **Manus 1.6 Max**, and **Manus 1.6 Lite**

- Credits don’t roll over monthly — but purchased add-on credits never expire

- Annual billing saves ~17% vs monthly


**Available on:** Web app, mobile app, Windows app, and the new **Browser Operator** extension (Chrome/Edge)

* * *

## 🛠️ Core Features Walkthrough: Everything Manus Can Do

Manus isn’t one feature — it’s an entire ecosystem. Here’s every major capability, what it does, and when to use it.

### 1\. Agent Mode (The Core Engine)

**What it does:** Plans and executes multi-step tasks autonomously using a virtual computer.

**How it works:** Manus runs a dedicated cloud-based virtual machine with full Ubuntu filesystem access and shell execution. It can browse, code, create files, run scripts, and deliver results — all without you lifting a finger.

**When to use it:** Any complex task that would normally require multiple tools and steps. Research reports, data analysis, website builds, competitor analysis, travel planning.

**Pro tip:** Use the “Manus’s Computer” window to watch the agent work in real-time. You can intervene and redirect at any point.

### 2\. Wide Research 🔬

**What it does:** Dispatches multiple AI sub-agents in parallel for large-scale research tasks.

**How it works:** Instead of analyzing items one by one (which degrades quality), Manus spins up dozens of dedicated agents, each handling an item independently. Think of it as going from one researcher to a research _team_.

**When to use it:** Lead generation at scale (200+ contacts), competitive analysis across hundreds of companies, market research across multiple industries, product comparisons.

**Best for Pro users** — this is where Manus truly outshines ChatGPT and Claude for research work.

### 3\. Manus Slides 📊

**What it does:** Creates professional, structured presentations with deep research baked in.

**How it works:** Describe the presentation topic and audience. Manus researches the topic, creates an outline, then generates slides one by one. You can edit text directly and request per-slide fixes using a “magic wand” prompt.

**Export options:** Google Slides, PowerPoint (PPTX), PDF

**When to use it:** Sales decks, investor pitches, project updates, training materials, client presentations.

### 4\. Design View 🎨

**What it does:** Interactive canvas for generating and editing images with point-and-click precision.

**How it works:** Generate images through prompts, then mark specific areas to modify. Add annotations, merge images, edit text, upscale to 8K resolution, and remove backgrounds — all without leaving Manus.

**When to use it:** Marketing visuals, social media graphics, thumbnails, product mockups, brand materials.

**Surprise winner:** Free users can generate AI images without a paid plan.

### 5\. Browser Operator 🌐

**What it does:** Transforms your local Chrome or Edge browser into an AI-powered autonomous agent.

**How it works:** Install the extension → grant permission → Manus operates your browser using your existing logins, cookies, and sessions. It can navigate premium tools (SEMrush, Ahrefs, LinkedIn, CRMs) that cloud-based AI can’t access.

**When to use it:** Extracting data from authenticated platforms, automating CRM workflows, pulling reports from Google Ads/Analytics, LinkedIn research with your own account.

**Game-changer for:** Marketers, sales teams, agencies, e-commerce businesses.

> ⚠️ Available for Pro, Plus, and Team users. Chrome and Edge supported.

### 6\. Mail Manus 📧

**What it does:** Trigger Manus tasks directly from your email inbox.

**How it works:** Forward an email to your personal Manus address. Manus reads the full context (including attachments), then creates the deliverable — whether it’s a presentation from meeting notes, a research report from a client brief, or action items from a long email thread.

**When to use it:** Converting email threads into structured deliverables, automated resume screening, meeting prep, client research.

### 7\. Scheduled Tasks ⏰

**What it does:** Automate recurring work on a schedule — daily, weekly, monthly, or custom.

**How it works:** Set up a task description + timing + output method. Manus runs it automatically and delivers results.

**Example setups:**

- “Every Monday at 8am, compile a summary of top AI news from the past week”

- “Every Friday, pull this week’s sales data and generate a performance report”

- “First of every month, analyze competitor pricing changes”


**When to use it:** News digests, weekly reporting, competitor tracking, social media monitoring.

### 8\. Website Builder 🏗️

**What it does:** Builds full web applications and landing pages from simple prompts.

**How it works:** Unlike typical AI website builders, Manus leverages its full agent capabilities — researching content, generating images, installing packages, testing the build, and deploying. It can even build apps with backend logic and databases.

**New in 1.6:** Mobile app development capability. Describe the app you want and Manus handles end-to-end development.

### 9\. Data Analysis & Visualization 📈

**What it does:** Upload data, get charts, graphs, and structured analysis back — no code required.

**How it works:** Manus runs Python in a sandbox, processes your CSV/Excel files, and returns visual insights. Works best with structured data and clear analytical questions.

### 10\. Manus Collab 👥

**What it does:** Turns any task into a shared workspace for real-time team collaboration.

**How it works:** Invite teammates to view and edit output together. Everyone sees updates instantly and can prompt Manus directly with feedback.

### 11\. Projects 📁

**What it does:** Persistent workspaces built around your instructions, files, and reusable context.

**How it works:** Create a Project with your SOPs, reference documents, and Connectors. Every task within that Project inherits the context — no need to re-explain your preferences each time.

**Power move:** Migrate past tasks into a Project to centralize scattered work.

### 12\. Cloud Browser ☁️

**What it does:** Manus’s sandboxed browser environment for tasks that don’t need local access.

**When to use it:** Most research, content creation, and analysis tasks. The default for Agent Mode.

**How it differs from Browser Operator:** Cloud browser is isolated and clean. Browser Operator uses your local logins and sessions.

* * *

## 🔗 The Complete Connectors Guide: Every Integration Explained

**Connectors** are Manus’s integration layer — they let the agent securely access your third-party tools, data, and APIs. This is what transforms Manus from a standalone assistant into a **central orchestration layer** for your digital workspace.

### Available MCP Connectors (Prebuilt)

[![](https://substackcdn.com/image/fetch/$s_!8LDT!,w_1456,c_limit,f_auto,q_auto:good,fl_progressive:steep/https%3A%2F%2Fsubstack-post-media.s3.amazonaws.com%2Fpublic%2Fimages%2F3d15b7ba-4094-4770-915f-5a286048413c_1258x972.png)](https://substackcdn.com/image/fetch/$s_!8LDT!,f_auto,q_auto:good,fl_progressive:steep/https%3A%2F%2Fsubstack-post-media.s3.amazonaws.com%2Fpublic%2Fimages%2F3d15b7ba-4094-4770-915f-5a286048413c_1258x972.png)

### Other Integration Options

- **Custom MCP Servers** — Build integrations with proprietary systems and internal APIs

- **Custom API Connectors** — Connect any tool with an API using your own credentials

- **Zapier** — Connect to 8,000+ apps through automated workflows

- **Manus API** — Programmatic access for custom applications


### How to Set Up Connectors

1. Go to **Settings → Connectors**

2. Select the app you want to connect

3. Click **“\+ Connect”** and authenticate with OAuth

4. Done. The connector is now available in all conversations and Projects.


**Power combo:** Attach Connectors to specific **Projects** so every task in that workspace has automatic access to the tools you need.

> 💡 **Privacy note:** Manus hides connector output in shared sessions and auto-redacts sensitive info like API keys.

* * *

## 🧩 Manus Skills: Turn Your Expertise Into Reusable AI Workflows

**Skills** are one of Manus’s most powerful — and most underrated — features.

Think of a Skill as an **operating manual** you hand your AI agent. It packages domain knowledge, procedures, and best practices into a reusable module. Once created, you trigger it with a simple slash command: **/SKILL\_NAME**.

### Why Skills Matter

- **Specialization** — Customize Manus for specific domains (legal review, financial analysis, brand content)

- **Reusability** — Create once, use across conversations and projects. Consistent results every time.

- **Composability** — Combine multiple Skills for complex, multi-step workflows


### How to Create a Skill

**Method 1: One-click packaging**

1. Complete a task with Manus that you love

2. Say: **“Package this workflow into a Skill”**

3. Manus auto-generates the SKILL.md file and bundles scripts

4. Name it, review it, done.


**Method 2: Upload a Skill** Upload a .zip, .skill file, or folder directly to your workspace.

**Method 3: Import from GitHub** Paste a repository link and Manus imports the Skill.

**Method 4: Add from Official Library** Browse curated Skills maintained by the Manus team.

### How to Use a Skill

Type **/** in the chat input to see your available Skills. Select one to activate it for the current conversation.

### Skill Ideas to Build Right Now

Here are 10 high-impact Skills you can create today:

01. **Weekly Report Generator** — Pulls data from your tools and formats a standardized weekly report

02. **Competitor Monitor** — Tracks competitor websites, pricing, and announcements on a schedule

03. **Meeting Notes to Action Items** — Takes raw notes and outputs structured action items with owners and deadlines

04. **Content Repurposer** — Takes a long-form article and generates social posts for LinkedIn, Twitter, and Instagram

05. **Customer Feedback Analyzer** — Processes NPS/CSAT data and generates themed insights

06. **SEO Content Brief Generator** — Researches keywords and creates detailed content briefs

07. **Invoice Parser** — Extracts data from invoices and populates a tracking spreadsheet

08. **Client Onboarding Checklist** — Generates customized onboarding documents per new client

09. **Code Review Assistant** — Analyzes code commits against your team’s style guide and flags issues

10. **Market Research Report** — Researches a market segment and outputs a structured analysis


### Advanced: Team Skill Library (Coming Soon for Team Plans)

Share battle-tested Skills across your org. New members inherit expert workflows instantly.

### Skills + Connectors = Superpower

Skills provide the **playbook**. MCP Connectors provide the **data pipeline**. Together, they create powerful, automated, end-to-end workflows.

Example: A “Pre-Meeting Prep” Skill that automatically pulls calendar events → fetches attendee LinkedIn profiles → generates a briefing document → emails it to you 30 minutes before the meeting.

* * *

# From Fiction to Function: 20+ Real-World Applications of Manus AI

[![Usama Bajwa](https://miro.medium.com/v2/da:true/resize:fill:32:32/0*SMgnrH9ODcc8wkwb)](https://medium.com/@usamabajwa86?source=post_page---byline--e426dadf3ab1---------------------------------------)

Discover how Manus AI turns visionary ideas into practical solutions across various sectors.

![](https://miro.medium.com/v2/resize:fit:700/1*7IyWMcQpYvEZKt4kyDQDuA.png)

_What if you could automate a month’s work in just ten minutes — and do it all with a single prompt?_

Press enter or click to view image in full size

![](https://miro.medium.com/v2/resize:fit:700/1*1LufF4FE4XPff7RLCJNeeg.png)

Manus used cases

In the explosion of generative AI, it’s easy to become numb to hype. But in 2025, **Manus AI** is quietly breaking new ground — not just dazzling with demos, but delivering authentic value in real workflows. From automating massive research projects to instantly building interactive apps and reports, its general-purpose agent model is winning over engineers, analysts, entrepreneurs, and everyday users alike.

Today, let’s break down why Manus is different, explore its top uses, and see how it’s impacting industries — backed by real examples you can try.

## **Why Manus Matters: The Shift Toward Generalist AI Agents**

AI in 2024–2025 is defined by a quest for autonomy. Classic chatbots like ChatGPT can write essays or code, but typical users still do most of the prepping, prompting, and reviewing. **Manus breaks this mold as a true action agent** — coordinating research, data analysis, text and code generation, and web automation with only high-level instructions.

Press enter or click to view image in full size

![](https://miro.medium.com/v2/resize:fit:700/1*1JqG02JWPpo9QCjMWCm5ow.png)

The significance? It bridges the gap between “AI assistant” and “AI colleague.” Instead of outputting a rough draft, Manus can build fully functional websites, analyze financials, summarize vast datasets, and automate complex multi-step projects. It’s rapidly becoming a favorite for anyone trying to save time on tedious tasks.

## Real-World Impact: The Best Manus AI Use Cases of 2025

Let’s dive into standout examples — each a real Manus project, complete with links to explore:

- **In-Depth Company Biography:** [Comprehensive Adobe Inc. biography](https://manus.im/share/XVcnAKs8sHtMe3LUdUDiHb?replay=1) crafted in a novel style.
- **Interactive Tech Learning:** [Transformer architecture course website](https://manus.im/share/oNNCT4ced1raFXdewLKSBg?replay=1) for visual, hands-on education.
- **Candidate Scheduling at Scale:** [Optimal interview management](https://manus.im/share/AN3pVVcq4qHnWbC55XhAYB?replay=1) for 40 candidates automatically.
- **Market Research in Minutes:** [Supplier sourcing (B2B)](https://manus.im/share/j7BUZNaC7vxEpqBU5GYQOR?replay=1) — get best deals with Manus-automated analysis.
- **Travel Itinerary Planning:** [Custom Japan trip handbook](https://manus.im/share/brWKUSp51ItvVMBpcXNCZ1?replay=1) built to personal taste.
- **E-Commerce Data Analysis:** [Amazon sales dashboards](https://manus.im/share/c3onakN6Iajcm1Vt1xAVG7?replay=1) with next steps and strategy.
- **Financial Report Analysis:** [Amazon stock earnings & sentiment analysis](https://manus.im/share/AZez7mV40jOYmRSgYBu6v3?replay=1).
- **Mass Email/Survey List Generation:** [Municipal address lists for Poland — 240 hours of manual work compressed into 10 minutes](https://manus.im/share/HUrsn8qoQXGbBZ7PPI5IhR?replay=1).
- **App Creation, Web Tools & More:** [Chrome extension sandbox game (Minecraft-like)](https://manus.im/share/QzQkPOWw7gUt03sWRDuzJD?replay=1)
- **Scientific & Education Resources:** [Quantum entanglement interactive research site](https://manus.im/share/tmAGeMrVPd9OcJuwtJCmkl?replay=1)

Manus is not just about automating text. It delivers high-quality code, analytical dashboards, interactive learning tools, and even advanced visualization.

## Trends & Insights: What Makes Manus Unique in the AI Landscape?

Unlike most AI tools that provide “one-shot” outputs, Manus is built for **multi-stage, outcome-oriented workflows**. Instead of asking a model for a list, you can prompt Manus to deliver a whole workflow, like designing a website, running a research survey, or analyzing and visualizing your store’s sales data.

**Three key differences:**

- Seamless orchestration of research, code, data, and UI generation in one continuous process.
- Transparency: outputs come with clear links, data sources, and explainability steps.
- Shareability: almost every project (from a game to a market report) is instantly shareable online for others to clone, review, or remix.

Try It Yourself: [manus.im](https://manus.im/)

## Future Outlook: Where Is Manus — and Generalist AI — Headed Next?

If current Manus adoption and results are any indication, the coming years will see a surge in real-world, agent-driven productivity.

- **Prediction:** By 2026, general-purpose AI agents like Manus will handle over **50% of repetitive business research and automation tasks**, freeing human workers for more strategic efforts.
- AI-driven code and data synthesis will be a standard part of company workflows — even in small businesses and remote teams.
- _AI as a collaborator, not just a tool_, will reshape how we learn, build products, manage projects, or analyze markets.

Expect to see an even richer Manus ecosystem — featuring plugin support, deeper integration with enterprise APIs, and stronger team collaboration tools.

## Action Steps: How to Harness Manus for Your Own Projects

Ready to move beyond chatbots and embrace true automation? Here’s where to start:

- Browse Manus’s [official site](https://manus.im/) and [case library](https://manus.im/home/ai-case).
- Duplicate and remix top use cases — like the [e-commerce store dashboard](https://manus.im/share/c3onakN6Iajcm1Vt1xAVG7?replay=1) or [game builder prompt](https://manus.im/share/QzQkPOWw7gUt03sWRDuzJD?replay=1).
- Contribute your own ideas — join community channels to learn how others are leveraging Manus’s capabilities.

**Don’t just watch the AI revolution — direct it!**

_Audit your current workflows and ask: “Could an agent like Manus save me 40 hours this month?”_
